recommendations.title: Landmine Goes Click
recommendations.overview: After an American tourist steps on a landmine, he is forced to watch his girlfriend get assaulted.

recommendations.title: Vengeance: A Love Story
recommendations.overview: When a new friend is brutally assaulted, Detective John Droomor is put by chance in charge of the investigation. Although the evidence against the perpetrators seems overwhelming, there is nothing definitive in the case that guarantees justice is ser

recommendations.title: SLC Punk
recommendations.overview: Two former geeks become 1980s punks, then party and go to concerts while deciding what to do with their lives.

recommendations.title: Bad Day for the Cut
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged Irish farmer, who still lives at home with his mother, sets off on a mission of revenge when the old lady is murdered.

recommendations.title: Jolt
recommendations.overview: A bouncer with an anger management problem goes on a furious and resentful rampage after the murder of a friend.

recommendations.title: Thriller: A Cruel Picture
recommendations.overview: Madeleine, rendered mute after being sexually assaulted as a youth, accepts a lift from a wealthy and sadistic pimp who soon enslaves her into his prostitution racket. Despite her limited means, Madeleine embarks on a bloody road to revenge against h

recommendations.title: Karla
recommendations.overview: Based on real events, Canada's most notorious serial killers, Paul Bernardo and wife Karla Homolka kidnap, sexually abuse, and murder three young girls.

recommendations.title: Law Abiding Citizen
recommendations.overview: A frustrated man decides to take justice into his own hands after a plea bargain sets one of his family's killers free. He targets not only the killer but also the district attorney and others involved in the deal.

recommendations.title: The Girl Who Escaped: The Kara Robinson Story
recommendations.overview: Based on a true story. 15-year-old Kara Robinson was kidnapped, assaulted and held captive for 18 hours. With her survival instincts kicking in, she plots a daring escape from the serial killer and leads police to his apartment.

recommendations.title: Sleepers
recommendations.overview: Two gangsters seek revenge on the state jail worker who during their stay at a youth prison sexually abused them. A sensational court hearing takes place to charge him for the crimes.
